beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Search the common house for a tree ent
beats.summary: Brynjar checks the common house at sunrise — no tree ents, two locals at breakfast, fire still warm.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Walk to the Common House
beats.summary: Brynjar enters the common house at sunrise — two women at breakfast, fire still warm, Mara's wayhouse chimney smoking up the lane.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Search for and meet Bynjar
beats.summary: Usnea steps inside to find and introduce themselves to Brynjar by the common house fire.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Ask Brynjar plainly what his stake is — what brings him here, what he knows, what he expects from the meeting.
beats.summary: Brynjar names his stake: a deliberate marker left beyond the new pass, and a question about whether it connects to the water crisis.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Try the two women at the table — ask casually whether either of them knows who else uses the east bank stock trail this
beats.summary: Two women at breakfast place the east bank traveler as a Venn family shepherd — and note a dark-coated figure who walked the river road south-to-north two days ago, before dawn, without stopping.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Greet Usnea and share what you've just learned — the Venn shepherd, the dark-coated figure — before you both go to Mara.
beats.summary: Brynjar briefs Usnea on the Venn shepherd and the dark-coated figure before heading to Mara's wayhouse.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Tell him the meeting is about to open — invite him to stay and hear the evidence, and let his question surface naturally
beats.summary: Usnea invites Brynjar to stay and hear the evidence, then steps outside to give Mara the opening signal.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Order mead from a common house worker
beats.summary: Brynjar orders morning mead from the common house apprentice; Usnea steps out to signal Mara.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Step briefly back inside and tell Brynjar to name the marker to the room himself, in his own words, when the moment open
beats.summary: Usnea signals Brynjar to name the marker himself, gives Mara the opening nod, and steps forward to begin the elder presentation.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Pay for the mead and take a slow sip — ask the apprentice if anyone passed through before dawn this morning.
beats.summary: Brynjar pays for the mead and learns heavy boots passed on the lane around second watch — nobody stopped in.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Open with Daybreak Mantle lit — let the warmth settle the room before the first word lands, particularly for Dresh
beats.summary: Daybreak Mantle opens the elder presentation — yard and common house settle into attending stillness without a word spoken.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Finish the mead in one go, pay the apprentice a second nail for his trouble, and ask if the grey-braided woman knows any
beats.summary: Brynjar's question about the heavy boots falls flat — the locals stay closed; Usnea returns and the wayhouse waits.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Something else entirely.
beats.summary: Brynjar and Usnea leave the common house and cross the lane to Mara's wayhouse.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Let Mara lead — follow her to the table, standing at her side as the evidence is laid out, present but not ahead of the
beats.summary: Evidence laid on the common house table; Councilor Dresh calls for plain speech; Pell takes her post at the threshold.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Say nothing yet — take stock of who's in the wayhouse common room before opening up
beats.summary: Brynjar takes stock of the wayhouse — Mara alone, fire built, food ready, room deliberately cleared.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Deliver your testimony now — name the seep, the geometric silt, the root-contact reading, and Aevi's assessment — plainl
beats.summary: Usnea delivers plain testimony — seep, geometry, lattice-count, Aevi's assessment — to the assembled elders.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Lay the rivercraft reading on the table first — the contamination ribbons are columnar and tight, feeding a fast channel
beats.summary: Brynjar delivers a clean rivercraft reading to Mara: point source, columnar ribbons, upper east fork; plus the second boot prints on the trail.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Let Aevi speak for itself — invite the motes to demonstrate the six-fold count directly for the room, making the rhythm
beats.summary: Aevi demonstrates the six-fold count directly above the residue pinch — the rhythm made visible for every elder in the room.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: acted
beats.summary: Aevi demonstrates the six-fold count above the residue pinch — three visible cycles witnessed by every elder, Pell, and Brynjar. Dresh speaks the word 'operating' aloud.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Answer Dresh directly: yes, operating — and name what that means for the village wells, the irrigation channels, and wha
beats.summary: Usnea names what 'operating' means for the village — wells, channels, south embankment, all inside the system's reach — to Dresh and the full elder panel.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Invite Sela forward now — the room just witnessed exactly the rhythm she has been hearing under the river. Let her tap i
beats.summary: Pell refuses to send Sela forward — the room is still processing, not ready; the sequence stalls at the threshold.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Ask the room — plainly, to whoever will answer — what question they are sitting with right now
beats.summary: Usnea asks the room what question it is sitting with — Dresh names it: does the system reach us, or reach for us.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Say nothing yet — let Dresh's question sit in the room a moment longer; watch who else answers before you add to it
beats.summary: Usnea holds silence after Dresh's question — the room turns it over, and the weight shifts from one person to the whole chamber.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Lay out everything at once — the Venn girl, the gray soil above the fence, the second prints, the heavy boots — and ask
beats.summary: Brynjar lays out the full picture; Mara connects the downstream boot prints to the pre-dawn lane passage and asks where the unknown traveler came from.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Read the trail from memory — heel depth, stride length, mud displacement — and give Mara your best read on whether those
beats.summary: Brynjar's trail-read confirms the prints came from above the high pasture fence — out of the Disputed Zone — but the exact origin distance stays uncertain.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Turn to Brynjar — the room is ready; this is the moment to name the marker from beyond the pass
beats.summary: Brynjar names the deliberately placed marker beyond the new pass to the elder panel — a second axis of deliberate intent enters the room.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Ask Dresh directly — given what she has just heard, does she want the tuning-warden's account before or after the memory
beats.summary: Usnea asks Dresh to sequence the final witnesses; Dresh calls for the tuning-warden first, then the memory glass.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Scrutinize Usnea and surroundings for details
beats.summary: Brynjar reads Usnea's trail-wear and Mara's quietly repositioned bench — she has prepared the room, not just the fire.

beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: Ask Usnea what they learned from the tuning-warden and the memory glass — fill the gap in what you know.
beats.summary: Usnea shares the elder panel testimony — six-fold lattice, 'operating not decaying,' the word deliberate now in the room.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Hold the sequence — tell the room plainly that the Heights witness is expected before noon and invite the elders to sit
beats.summary: Usnea holds the sequence plainly — Heights witness before noon, sit with the question until then. The room absorbs it and waits.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: Conjure comfort and sustenance for the group via hearthbinding
beats.summary: Hearthbinding fails to settle the room — the waiting tension runs too high for comfort to take hold.
